## Content Performance Analysis

### Content #1: "The 3-Second Hook Pattern"
**Content ID:** tiktok-video-2025-001
**Platforms:** TikTok (primary), Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Twitter/X

**Predicted Performance:**

| Platform | Views | Engagement | Shares | Status |
|----------|-------|------------|--------|--------|
| TikTok | 50,000 | 15% | 500+ | Draft |
| Instagram | 25,000 | 12% | 200+ | Draft |
| YouTube | 25,000 | 10% | 100+ | Draft |
| Twitter/X | 10,000 impressions | 8% | 50+ | Draft |

**Why It Will Work:**
- **Hook Type:** Pattern interrupt (violates "be consistent" advice)
- **Psychological Framework:** Curiosity gap + social proof
- **Target Emotion:** Surprise + inspiration
- **Algorithm Alignment:** High (trending educational content)

**Content DNA:**
- **Hook:** "STOP SCROLLING" (pattern interrupt)
- **Value:** 3-step formula with explanation
- **Curiosity:** Comment "HOOK" for template
- **CTA:** Follow for Part 2
